videos.headline: Davis III pulls down catch over two defenders
videos.description: Alex Hornibrook tosses it up, Danny Davis III goes and gets it for a 50-yard gain.

videos.headline: Edwards picks off Hoge on the Cougars first drive
videos.description: Beau Hoge's first pass of the game is intercepted by T.J. Edwards to give Wisconsin a short field.

videos.headline: Taylor punches it in for the Badgers TD
videos.description: Jonathan Taylor scores the first TD of the game for the Badgers from the goal line.

videos.headline: Cephus extends lead for Wisconsin
videos.description: Alex Hornibrook finds Quintez Cephus for a 9-yard TD.

videos.headline: Cephus finds the end zone once again
videos.description: Hornibrook connects with Quintez Cephus again for a 15-yard TD just before halftime.

videos.headline: Taylor adds on to lead for Wisconsin
videos.description: A.J. Taylor extends the lead for Wisconsin after a 18-yard TD grab.

videos.headline: Wisconsin tacks on to their lead with a safety
videos.description: Mike Maskalunas forces BYU QB Beau Hoge into end zone for a safety.

videos.headline: Fumagalli reels in 19-yard TD  for Badgers
videos.description: Wisconsin QB Alex Hornibrook fires his 4th TD pass of the game to Troy Fumagalli for 19 yards.

videos.headline: Paul Chryst wants to stay focused for 2nd half
videos.description: Paul Chryst and his Wisconsin Badgers lead 24-6 at the half.
